parameters.query: SELECT id, title, description, priority, deadline::text AS deadline, status, completed_at::text AS completed_at, created_at::text AS created_at FROM planner_tasks WHERE session_id = $1 AND ($2 = 'all' OR status = $2) AND user_id = $3 ORDER BY status ASC, (CASE priority WHEN 'high' THEN 1 WHEN 'medium' THEN 2 ELSE 3 END), COALESCE(deadline, '9999-12-31'::date) ASC, created_at DESC

INSERT INTO planner_tasks (session_id, title, description, priority, deadline, user_id) VALUES ($1, $2, NULLIF($3, ''), $4, NULLIF($5, '')::date, $6) RETURNING id, title, description, priority, deadline::text AS deadline, status, created_at::text AS created_at

UPDATE planner_tasks SET title = COALESCE($3, title), description = COALESCE($4, description), priority = COALESCE($5, priority), deadline = CASE WHEN $6::boolean THEN deadline ELSE NULLIF($7, '')::date END, status = COALESCE($8, status), completed_at = CASE WHEN COALESCE($8, status) = 'completed' AND completed_at IS NULL THEN NOW() WHEN COALESCE($8, status) = 'active' THEN NULL ELSE completed_at END WHERE id = $1 AND session_id = $2 AND user_id = $9 RETURNING id, title, description, priority, deadline::text AS deadline, status, completed_at::text AS completed_at
DELETE FROM planner_tasks WHERE id = $1 AND session_id = $2 AND user_id = $3 RETURNING id

SELECT id, title, description, priority, deadline::text AS deadline FROM planner_tasks WHERE session_id = $1 AND status = 'active' AND user_id = $2 ORDER BY (CASE priority WHEN 'high' THEN 1 WHEN 'medium' THEN 2 ELSE 3 END), COALESCE(deadline, '9999-12-31'::date) ASC, created_at DESC LIMIT 100

WITH _lock AS (SELECT pg_advisory_xact_lock(hashtext($1)) AS l), _u AS (INSERT INTO chat_memory (session_id, role, content) VALUES ($1, 'user', $2) RETURNING id), _a AS (INSERT INTO chat_memory (session_id, role, content) SELECT $1, 'assistant', $3 WHERE LENGTH(TRIM($3)) > 0 RETURNING id) SELECT _u.id AS uid, COALESCE((SELECT id FROM _a), 0) AS aid FROM _u CROSS JOIN _lock

UPDATE planner_sessions SET last_used_at = NOW() WHERE token = $1 AND expires_at > NOW();
SELECT s.user_id, u.username FROM planner_sessions s JOIN planner_users u ON u.id = s.user_id WHERE s.token = $1 AND s.expires_at > NOW();
